rag_rules: Place assumptions in component type annexes and implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes
Use valid component type scopes for port references in assumptions and guarantees
Avoid subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
Align helper declaration types with expression types (bool for comparisons, int for integer arithmetic, real for real arithmetic)
generic_rules: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
Place assumptions in component type annexes and implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes
Use valid component type scopes for port references in assumptions and guarantees
Avoid subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
anti_patterns: Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants for them
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
